vertical_split_selection.sort_order: descending by non_pk_column_count, then table name

base_predicate_sqls: ("category" = 'Camera and Electrical Department' OR ("category" = 'Sound Department' OR ("category" = 'Location Management' OR "category" = 'Editorial Department')))

("category" IS NULL OR "category" NOT IN ('Cast', 'Produced by', 'Additional Crew', 'General', 'Art Department', 'Camera and Electrical Department', 'Sound Department', 'Location Management', 'Editorial Department'))
fragment_roles: rows where category = Produced by + rows where category = Additional Crew
rows where category = General + rows where category = Art Department
rows where category = Camera and Electrical Department + rows where category = Sound Department + rows where category = Location Management + rows where category = Editorial Department

rows where category is NULL or not in {'Cast', 'Produced by', 'Additional Crew', 'General', 'Art Department', 'Camera and Electrical Department', 'Sound Department', 'Location Management', 'Editorial Department'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)
Credit.fragment_role_B: rows where category = Produced by + rows where category = Additional Crew

base_predicate_sqls: ("birth_country" = 'USA' OR (("birth_country" = 'Canada' OR (("birth_country" = 'Colombia' OR "birth_country" = 'Germany') OR ("birth_country" = 'India' OR "birth_country" = 'Ireland'))) OR ("birth_country" = 'England' OR ("birth_country" = 'Italy' OR "birth_country" = 'Poland'))))
fragment_roles: rows where birth_country = USA + rows where birth_country = Canada + rows where birth_country = Colombia + rows where birth_country = Germany + rows where birth_country = India + rows where birth_country = Ireland + rows where birth_country = England + rows where birth_country = Italy + rows where birth_country = Poland
rows where birth_country is NULL or not in {'USA', 'Canada', 'England', 'Colombia', 'Germany', 'India', 'Ireland', 'Italy', 'Poland'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)
Person||vfrag=birth_country.fragment_role_A: rows where birth_country = USA + rows where birth_country = Canada + rows where birth_country = Colombia + rows where birth_country = Germany + rows where birth_country = India + rows where birth_country = Ireland + rows where birth_country = England + rows where birth_country = Italy + rows where birth_country = Poland
Person||vfrag=birth_country.fragment_role_B: rows where birth_country is NULL or not in {'USA', 'Canada', 'England', 'Colombia', 'Germany', 'India', 'Ireland', 'Italy', 'Poland'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)

justification.cross_local_query_count_interpretation: Distinct cross-local workload queries where this fragment pair (different original tables) co-occurs; not an estimate of single-local queries after relocation.

relocation_engine_debug.pair_weight_meaning: Weights count co-occurrences of two fragments (from different original tables) inside workload queries that already span 2+ locals. They rank relocation candidates; they do not equal the number of queries that will become single-local after a move.
